_meta.purpose: Atomic landing-page content blocks captured 1:1 from the Figma 'Landingpage - Blocks' catalog. The recurring content unit is a TEASER (kicker + heading + description + optional Tag+meta + Link); it appears alone, inside a Card, with a leading Image (top), beside an Image (media-text row), or with a leading illustrative Icon. landingpage/block-patterns.json composes these into section-level patterns.
_meta.source: Figma file uI6oKmJ0qDhsEuE0nFah2W, node 730:14782 (Landingpage - Blocks) → section 730:14799 (Contentpage Modules).
_meta.placeholderConvention: <...> = fill with real content; optional trailing '?' means the node may be dropped when empty. A '<a|b|c>' placeholder is a closed choice.
_meta.refConvention: { "$ref": "block.id" } expands to that block's `plan` fragment. The agent expands $ref when authoring the Composition Plan — the render runtime never sees $ref.

landingpage.teaser.purpose: The core landing-page teaser text block: an optional kicker (Small, muted), a Heading, a description, an optional Tag + meta row, and a single navigation Link. Reused inside cards, image teasers and media-text rows.

landingpage.teaser-card.source: 362:3912 → 0:316 (card teaser in the feature grid example)
landingpage.teaser-card.purpose: A teaser wrapped in an elevation-1 Card: Heading + description + Link. Used in a card grid. TOP-aligned; auto equal-height in a grid.

landingpage.image-teaser.source: 680:8960 → 0:159 (image-top teaser in the teaser grid example)
landingpage.image-teaser.purpose: A teaser led by an Image on top, followed by the teaser text block (heading + description + Link). Used in a teaser/feature grid. The image uses a design-system ratio.

landingpage.media-text-block.purpose: The text column of a media-text row: optional kicker, a Heading, a description, an optional Tag + meta row, and a single Link. Vertically centered against the image (fillHeight).

landingpage.image.purpose: A single image using a design-system ratio (never a free pixel height) with a bound radius token.
